_comment: The standard evaluation battery: the dimensions run on every blueprint and their default context. Central and story-agnostic — this replaces the per-mystery outcome.spec.json dimension lists, so a spec directory now contains only input.brief.json. Per-mystery overrides are intentionally not supported at this stage.

probe_topics: their own background and a brief sketch of their life
their knowledge of the other characters
their knowledge of the central mystery
